personality_one_liner: A warm, paper-like, tactile experience that feels like a personal chef writing a friendly note.

spacing.rule: Generous, breathable, paper-like margins. Avoid dense stacking. Keep padding soft and elements distinctly separated.

dont's: No glassmorphism. This app relies on tactile paper, solid soft colors, and ink. Blur effects break the hand-drawn/journal aesthetic.

screens.name: SetupScreen
screens.purpose: First-launch onboarding to capture Gemini API key and Kitchen Brand Name.

states.error: Inline error text below inputs in faded clay red (#C65D47).

screens.layout: Hero image at the top featuring a cloud kitchen context (image tinted with a top-to-bottom gradient scrim). Large Fraunces greeting 'Let's set up your kitchen'. Two spacious text inputs (surfaceTertiary background, Nunito font) for 'Kitchen Name' and 'Gemini API Key'. A sticky 'Save & Continue' button pinned to the bottom of the screen.

screens.name: PrinterSetupScreen
screens.purpose: Scan, list, and pair with the 58mm Bluetooth thermal printer. Shown automatically if not connected.

states.loading: Pulsing printer icon at the top with 'Searching for nearby thermal printers...'
states.empty: Illustration of a printer with 'No printers found nearby. Is it powered on?' and a 'Retry' button.
states.error: Toast or inline message 'Connection failed. Please ensure the printer is awake.'

screens.layout: Zero-Click Discovery style. Header with 'Connect Printer'. If scanning, a pulsing icon. Discovered devices populate as a vertical list of cards (surfaceSecondary). Each card has a printer icon, device name (bold), and a 'Connect' button (brandPrimary pill). Footer has a subtle 'Skip for now' or troubleshooting link.

screens.name: MainInputScreen
screens.purpose: Capture the customer's name and current order number to generate the quote.

states.error: Red inline text if Name is left empty.

screens.layout: Highly focused, minimalist paper desk feel. 'Who is this order for?' heading. A large, oversized input for the Customer Name. Below it, a stepper or input for Order Number (defaults to 1). A large, sticky 'Generate Sticky Note' button pinned to the bottom.

screens.name: PreviewScreen
screens.purpose: Display the generated Hinglish quote on a digital sticky note, with actions to regenerate or print.

states.loading: The sticky note is visible but blank, with a soft pencil-scribble loading animation or a spinner in the center.
states.error: Sticky note shows a 'Failed to generate quote' message with a 'Try Again' button.

screens.layout: Background is 'surface'. Centerpiece is a large 'brandTertiary' (#F7E5A9) square card representing the sticky note, styled with a slight rotation (-2deg) and shadow tier 2 to look like a real physical note. The text inside MUST use a handwritten font (e.g., Caveat or Kalam) in 'onSurface' color. Below the note, two large buttons arranged vertically or side-by-side: a 'Regenerate' button (brandSecondary/terracotta) and a 'Print to 58mm' button (brandPrimary/mustard, sticky at bottom).

screens.name: SettingsScreen
screens.purpose: Allow the owner to update the Gemini Key, Kitchen Name, or select a new Printer.
screens.layout: Standard list layout with generous padding. Sections for 'API Configuration' and 'Printer Settings'. Includes a 'Disconnect Printer' or 'Find New Printer' row with a tinted icon container. Changes auto-save.

hero_kitchen.alt: A delivery worker packing food containers in a cloud kitchen.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Personality 8 (Hand-Drawn / Journal) to create a warm, tactile, paper-like interface.
Do NOT use any blue, purple, or indigo colors. Stick to the provided palette: warm off-white (paper), charcoal (ink), mustard/yellow (sticky note), and terracotta (accent).
For the Sticky Note in 'PreviewScreen', it is CRITICAL to load and use a handwritten Google Font like 'Caveat' or 'Kalam' for the quote text. This sells the 'personal chef note' illusion.
Apply a slight rotation (e.g., transform: [{ rotate: '-2deg' }]) and shadow to the sticky note view to make it feel like a physical piece of paper sitting on the desk.
No glassmorphism. Use solid colors and soft shadows.
For Bluetooth printing, recommend a library like 'react-native-thermal-receipt-printer-image-qr' to handle 58mm ESC/POS commands.

Gemini Prompt Instructions: Ensure the prompt sent to the Gemini 2.5 Flash model explicitly asks for 'Hinglish', 'warm/funny/motivational', 'under 3 lines', and incorporates the Kitchen Name, Customer Name, and Order Number.
Do not use Emojis anywhere in the UI chrome. Use Ionicons with the 'outline' style for a delicate, drawn feel.
Always apply a top-to-bottom gradient scrim over the 'hero_kitchen' image on the Setup Screen to ensure text placed over it remains highly legible.
